heroHeadline: KMT Chair Cheng Li-wun Departs for China Tomorrow (Apr 7) — Internal KMT Unease; PLA 3 Sorties Apr 5 (YTD Down 46.5%); Defense Budget Still Unresolved
heroSubtitle: PLA oscillates: Apr 5 = 3 sorties (all crossing median line); YTD 2026 sorties 46.5% below 2025 pace amid KMT-China diplomatic engagement; Cheng departs April 7 (Shanghai → Nanjing → Beijing); internal KMT divisions over visit risks; DPP + US senators urge defense budget passage before trip; Poland issues first-ever Taiwan Strait warning (Apr 4); 38 days to Trump-Xi Beijing summit (May 14-15)
footerNote: Data sourced from Taiwan MND, US DoD, DSCA, CSIS ChinaPower, Global Taiwan Institute, AIT, Reuters, AP, Bloomberg, NPR, Taipei Times, Focus Taiwan, Nikkei Asia, Japan Times, ANI News, Vision Times, South China Morning Post, Taiwan News, Asia Times, The Asia Cable, GlobalSecurity.org, and institutional analyses. All claims reflect multi-pole sourcing across Western, East Asian, and international media.
